notes:
v2.6.53 — Breakout Look-back Window

- Bot now catches breakouts that fired 1-2 bars before you started it
- Signal must still be alive at current price (not closed back through trendline)
- ATR cap prevents entering overextended moves (1.5x ATR max distance)
- Asian session excluded from look-back (active sessions only)
- All users on same broker and same version now scan identically
